_comment: Category bands on the 0-100 score (REFACTOR_SPEC §5.4). Naive defaults; calibration would re-fit these where the historical conversion rate scales (docs/calibration.md). 'invalid' is NOT a band: it comes from the gate / looks_invalid. 'warm_high' is the single automation cutoff: the agent starts only for a lead with consent and score >= warm_high (hot is always above it). Missing info -> the agent recovers it then books; complete -> it books directly (src/action/decision.py). All naive/calibratable.
